blocks.content: On the other side of town, Kit was standing in front of his closet trying to figure out what counted as effort without being obvious about it.
His mom appeared in the doorway.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I was already looking at that one.
She leaned against the door frame with her coffee.
Kit pulled the blue button-down off the hanger.
His mom smiled into her coffee — the small private one she used when she knew something and was choosing not to say it — and pushed off the doorframe.
He held the shirt up in front of the mirror. Thought about it. Put it on.
